_meta.source: BEACON live API — auto-logged by server.js

regime.name: NEUTRAL
regime.label: Neutral / Mixed Signals
regime.desc: Signals are not strongly aligned in any direction. Standard DCA allocation is appropriate. Monitor closely for a regime shift toward Accumulation or Distribution.

interval.label: Every 5 days
interval.reason: Elevated volatility — semi-frequent accumulation captures more of the swings.
